name: Karai (TMNT)
description: Hamato Miwa, mainly known as Karai, is a young girl who is caught in the middle between a fight between Hamato Yoshi (Karai's biological father) and Oroku Saki. She was an anti hero/villainess in the first season and the first half of season 2 when she believed that Saki was her father. During the second season, when Karai found out that Saki was lying to her, she turned against him and became a hero. She is the biological daughter and eldest child of Hamato Yoshi and Tang Shen.
creator: Ivan Lee
